name: status-reporter
description: Two-step daily status reporting. /status-log captures each work session as an append-only fragment; /status-export merges, de-duplicates, polishes, and renders a single professional bilingual (en/ar) PDF via a fixed HTML template. Cross-platform (Windows/macOS/Linux); renders with a headless Chromium browser CLI — no MCP server required. No external messaging dependencies — the report is produced locally.
